name: marktplaats-zonder-spam
description: Vanilla WebExtension that hides unwanted Marktplaats and 2dehands listing clutter.

scripts.validate: python -m json.tool manifest.json >/dev/null && python -m json.tool package.json >/dev/null && node --check src/content.js && node --check options/options.js
scripts.lint: web-ext lint --source-dir . --ignore-files dist --ignore-files web-ext-artifacts --ignore-files node_modules --ignore-files .git --ignore-files .github --ignore-files scripts --ignore-files package.json --ignore-files package-lock.json --ignore-files AMO_SUBMISSION.md --ignore-files README.md --ignore-files .gitignore
scripts.amo:prep: npm run validate && npm run lint && npm run package
